indications.text:
NIMBEX is indicated:
• as an adjunct to general anesthesia to facilitate tracheal intubation in adults and in pediatric
patients 1 month to 12 years of age
• to provide skeletal muscle relaxation in adults during surgical procedures or during
mechanical ventilation in the ICU
• to provide skeletal m...

NIMBEX is an intermediate-onset/intermediate-duration neuromuscular blocking agent indicated for
inpatients and outpatients as an adjunct to general anesthesia, to facilitate tracheal intubation, and to
provide skeletal muscle relaxation during surgery or mechanical ventilation in the ICU.
